title: feuilleea umbellata
intro: Feuilleea umbellata, also known as the Chinese feather fern, is a species of fern native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Feuilleea umbellata include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and promoting digestion. Herbal preparations of Feuilleea umbellata include teas and infusions made from its leaves, which can be used to treat various health issues.
